headline: RTX Expands Sensor And Software Role With Landsat Next And Naval Radar
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) subsidiary Raytheon completed the preliminary design review for NASA's Landsat Next Instrument Suite, a step toward higher resolution, multispectral earth observation. The Landsat Next multispectral imager is designed to provide more spectral bands and finer spatial detail for environmental, climate, and agricultural monitoring. RTX also secured a new U.S. Navy contract to develop advanced naval radar software intended to support adaptive, multi-mission maritime...

headline: Ray Dalio Says AI Productivity Is A Historic Opportunity, But Galazy\s Mike Novogratz Isn't So Sure
summary: Ray Dalio says AI productivity can grow America out of its debt hole. Mike Novogratz says Washington will whiff it, and the robot tax is coming.

headline: RTX's Raytheon completes design review of Landsat Next space instruments
summary: Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, has successfully completed the preliminary design review for NASA's Landsat Next Instrument Suite (LandIS). Raytheon is providing multiple components for the program, including the multispectral imager, engineering analyses, algorithms, fabrication, testing and support.

headline: RTX's Raytheon awarded contract to further develop next-generation software-defined radar capability
summary: Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, has been awarded a contract from the Office of Naval Research to further develop advanced radar software for next-generation naval radars.
